name: Two-Hander
description: Early greatsword used for the Warrior unlock route.
notes: Found in Trevo Mine for Vocation Frustration; keep until turned in or vocation is unlocked.

name: Grievous Horns
description: Early archistaff used for the Sorcerer unlock route.
notes: Found in Trevo Mine for Vocation Frustration; keep until turned in or vocation is unlocked.

name: Ferrystone
description: Consumable fast-travel item used with Portcrystals.
notes: Useful but scarce early; do not waste during OP route unless route safety requires it.

name: Ring of Cooling
description: Accessory loot associated with Trevo Mine route data.
notes: Exact stats should be checked in own playthrough before using in calculations.

name: Signs of Valor
description: Weapon/loot listed for Trevo Mine route data.
notes: Keep as low-priority loot until item stats are verified.

name: Ranger's Tights
description: Leg armor listed for Trevo Mine route data.
notes: Optional early loot; verify exact stats later.

name: Jasper
description: Valuable/trade material listed as Trevo Mine loot.
notes: Route treats this as optional value loot.

name: Explosive Arrow
description: Ammunition listed as Trevo Mine loot.
notes: Useful only for bow users or sale/storage.

name: Golden Trove Beetle
description: Permanent carry-capacity collectible. Consuming one increases carry capacity for the Arisen or main pawn.
notes: Sprint 3I adds route-friendly starter markers; exact marker positions should be verified through calibration before publishing as precise collectible map.

name: Newt Liqueur
description: Alcohol item used for The Sotted Sage and Warfarer unlock.
notes: Sprint 3I adds Higg's Tavern Stand, Earland, lab, Windwalker's Home and crafting sources.

name: Portcrystal
description: Reusable fast-travel target that can be placed in the world and used with Ferrystones.
notes: Sprint 3I adds quest, nest and Dragonforged acquisition routes plus recommended placement context.

name: Beastren Mask
description: Mask used to pass as Beastren for specific Battahl interactions.
notes: Useful for safely accessing Higg's Tavern Stand secret Newt Liqueur purchase route.

name: Fruit Wine
description: Rare ingredient that can be combined with Saurian Tail to make Newt Liqueur.
notes: Guide sources report several quest reward routes; exact reward rows can be expanded later.

name: Saurian Tail
description: Monster material used in the Newt Liqueur crafting route.
notes: Farm by fighting Saurians and cutting tails; exact farming spots later.

name: Wyrmslife Crystal
description: Special currency used by the Dragonforged.
notes: Needed for Dragonforged Portcrystal purchase route.

name: Marcher Set
description: Castle guard disguise set used for stealth/sneak routes.
notes: Route uses it during Disa's Plot / castle infiltration context.

name: Courtly Tunic
description: Formal attire item needed for masquerade/coronation route steps.
notes: Keep one in storage until Act 1 Brant route is done.

name: Courtly Breeches
description: Formal attire item needed for masquerade/coronation route steps.
notes: Keep one in storage until Act 1 Brant route is done.

name: Torn Letter
description: Evidence item collected during Disa's Plot.
notes: Turn in to Brant to complete the quest.

name: Wakestone
description: Revive item; route treats this as high-value safety stock.
notes: Disa's Plot can reward a Wakestone according to public guide data.

name: Gaol Key
description: Key provided by Brant for The Caged Magistrate.
notes: Return/forgery decisions are handled as route notes later.

name: Bill of Arrest for Darragh
description: Quest evidence from The Nameless Village route.
notes: Return to Brant to complete The Nameless Village.

name: Legend's Opus / Blades of the Pyre Scroll
description: Thief Maister scroll from the Nameless Village route.
notes: Useful for future Thief route; optional for Fighter OP Fast.

name: Pilferer's Handbook / Formless Feint Scroll
description: Thief Maister scroll from Srail in the Nameless Village Depths.
notes: High-value future vocation unlock content.

name: Ring of Grit
description: Reward associated with Readvent of Calamity public guide data.
notes: Optional reward; route mainly cares about Sigurd/Mystic Spearhand opportunity.

name: Dead Ringer
description: Duospear noted around the Readvent of Calamity lesser dragon opportunity.
notes: Useful later for Mystic Spearhand context; verify drop/availability in playthrough.
